title: uppercase (deprecated)
text: uppercase (deprecated) Convert the specified string to uppercase. Note: The uppercase statement is deprecated. It has been superseded by $uppercase function, which is applicable to all component types. uppercase Source , Target Example uppercase vString1, vString2 Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description Source String Content to convert to uppercase Target Destination of converted content; can be a field or variable that can accept a string value. Return Values None Use Allowed in all component types. Description The uppercase statement converts the contents of Source to uppercase, then places the result in Target . Conversion is on a character-by-character basis as defined by Unicode. Note: Locale-based processing rules are not applied when using uppercase . If this is desired, use $uppercase . The following example converts the contents of vString1 to uppercase: Explain this code vString1 = "abc" uppercase vString1, vString2 ;Result: : vString2 = "ABC" Copy Related Links Case Conversion You can use ProcScript statements and functions to convert string from uppercase to lowercase or from lowercase to uppercase. The default conversion behavior is determined by the values of NLS assignment settings and ProcScript functions, which control locale-based processing. $lowercase Convert a string to lowercase. $uppercase Convert the specified string uppercase. lowercase (deprecated) Convert a string to lowercase.
